purpose: Pin the proposed RL execution-state contract for the future RL-execution layer (C12). Schema is a forward-looking proposal; no live consumer exists today.
trigger_reason: C12 requires at least one SMC family to have been live in C8 incubation for >= 4 weeks. As of pin date, no family meets this condition. See scripts/check_c12_trigger.py for the live check.

proposed_state_fields.name: remaining_qty
proposed_state_fields.note: Outstanding order quantity to be filled.

proposed_state_fields.name: current_volatility
proposed_state_fields.note: Realized volatility estimate at decision time.

proposed_state_fields.name: recent_volume_profile
proposed_state_fields.note: Volume distribution over the last K bars; K is a hyperparameter.

proposed_state_fields.name: signal_strength
proposed_state_fields.note: Calibrated P(profitable) from the C10 ML layer or rule-based fallback.

phase_c_sizing.hard_cap_note: Risk-Manager veto enforces this cap unconditionally; RL output is advisory.

audit_trail.follow_up_pr: C12 full sprint (deferred until trigger gate is GREEN; see docs/SPRINT_PLAN_C12_RL_EXECUTION_2026-04-26.md)
